test.name: TC01 Register User

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sign Up To The Application
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input@[type="submit"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input@[type="submit"]' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalid-selector-exception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4a629c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e478a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e44edb2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e44f5ab1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e44f8bc5] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e44f8c8f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e454631e] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e4546eac] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e4597017] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e4593b9b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e4539298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e453a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4a8de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4a88588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4aa9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e47a6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e47afacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4793634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e47937e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e4777e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffae1b1e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffae30cc48c+2c]

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input@[type="submit"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input@[type="submit"]' is not a valid XPath expression. kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: check if the user is able to register
test.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input@[type="submit"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input@[type="submit"]' is not a valid XPath expression.
